title: ArchitectureImpact
description: Envelope-composed architecture impact artifact emitted by an Architect Role for the Protocol Proof MVP. The payload is intentionally small and machine-readable so validation can judge architectural impact without parsing a prose report.
$comment: Required payload fields are summary, affected_surfaces, owned_surfaces, proposed_changes, risks, tradeoffs, decisions, and assumptions. The shared envelope owns artifact identity, timestamps, refs, producer metadata, confidence, review gates, diagnostics, and the artifact's top-level ownership declaration.

affected_surfaces.description: REQUIRED object. Surfaces the story is expected to affect, using the shared ownership-surface categories for machine comparison.

owned_surfaces.description: REQUIRED object. Surfaces this architecture impact artifact claims as its direct architectural scope, using the reusable ownership-surface sub-schema.

proposed_changes.description: REQUIRED array. Proposed architectural changes or components. At least one change is required for a produced ArchitectureImpact.

risks.description: REQUIRED array. Machine-readable risks introduced or exposed by the proposed architecture.

tradeoffs.description: REQUIRED array. Machine-readable chosen-vs-rejected tradeoffs behind the proposed architecture.

decisions.description: REQUIRED array. Explicit architectural decisions or deferred decisions the proof validation gate can inspect.

assumptions.description: REQUIRED array. Assumptions the Architect Role relied on when context was incomplete or future validation is needed.

architectureImpactSummary.title: ArchitectureImpactSummary
architectureImpactSummary.description: REQUIRED object. Compact structured summary of the impact classification; detailed analysis belongs in sibling arrays.

impact_level.description: REQUIRED string. Overall architectural impact level for routing and review gates.

affected_primitive.description: REQUIRED string. ADR-1 primitive most directly affected by this impact.

change_type.description: REQUIRED string. Action proposed for the component or surface.

target_surfaces.description: REQUIRED object. Concrete surfaces targeted by this change.

name.description: REQUIRED string. Stable component, package, schema, primitive, workflow, or module name.

kind.description: REQUIRED string. Component category for downstream validation and routing.

affected_surfaces.description: REQUIRED object. Surfaces exposed to this risk.

mitigation_codes.description: REQUIRED array. Machine-readable mitigation or follow-up codes. Empty means no mitigation is known yet.

chosen_option.description: REQUIRED string. Stable label for the option selected by the architecture.

rejected_options.description: REQUIRED array. Stable labels for meaningful alternatives that were not selected.

status.description: REQUIRED string. Decision state at emission time.

decision.description: REQUIRED string. Stable decision label or short decision statement.

applies_to_surfaces.description: REQUIRED object. Surfaces governed by this decision.

subject.description: REQUIRED string. Stable label for the assumed fact or constraint.

confidence.description: REQUIRED string. Confidence bucket for this assumption.

validation_needed.description: REQUIRED boolean. True when a later validation gate or human must confirm the assumption.

reasonCodes.description: Machine-readable reason codes; consumers must not parse prose to understand the decision.
